command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3rBufSZ3uxLEBEp.f06ed5d6f482 --database RLqBMQr5dRLMySYrecFLe9 --execute SELECT * FROM workshops LIMIT 5;

rows.title: Calligrafia Cinese — Introduzione
rows.description: Discover the art of Chinese calligraphy in a 2-hour hands-on session. Learn basic strokes, brush control, and write your first characters under expert guidance.
rows.descriptionZh: 在兩小時的實作課程中探索漢字書法藝術。學習基本筆畫、毛筆控制，並在專家指導下書寫你的第一個漢字。

rows.title: Pittura a Inchiostro — Fiori di Pruno
rows.description: Learn the meditative art of Chinese ink painting. Paint plum blossoms using traditional techniques — brush pressure, ink dilution, and negative space.
rows.descriptionZh: 學習中國水墨畫的冥想藝術。使用傳統技法繪製梅花——筆壓、墨水稀釋與留白。

rows.title: Cerimonia del Tè — Stile Dadaocheng
rows.description: Experience a traditional Taiwanese tea ceremony inspired by the historic Dadaocheng tea culture. Learn gongfu cha technique and taste premium Taiwanese teas.
rows.descriptionZh: 體驗以大稻埕歷史茶文化為靈感的台灣傳統茶道。學習功夫茶技藝，品嚐頂級台灣茶。
